objective.description: Create a comprehensive Phase 3 verification script that confirms:

context.description: This is the final verification step for Phase 3. It consolidates checks from previous plans and provides a go/no-go decision for Phase 3 completion.

task.title: Create Comprehensive Verification Script
task.description: Create comprehensive Phase 3 verification script with 10 checks and summary reporting.

check.name: Test Scripts
check.description: Verify test scripts can be imported

task.title: Create Phase 3 Summary Document
task.description: Create comprehensive Phase 3 completion summary with objectives achieved, deliverables, and sign-off section.

task.title: Create Post-Verification Checklist
task.description: Create human verification checklist for Phase 3 completion sign-off.

command.code:
../../.venv/Scripts/python -c " import sys sys.path.insert(0, 'api')
# Quick imports from config import REDIS_URL, NEO4J_URI, LLM_ENTITY_EXTRACTION_MODEL from tasks.document_processing_tasks import app, process_document_task from kg_processor import KnowledgeGraphProcessor
print('✅ Quick verification passed') print(f' Redis: {REDIS_URL}') print(f' Neo4j: {NEO4J_URI}') print(f' Model: {LLM_ENTITY_EXTRACTION_MODEL}') print(f' Tasks: {len(list(app.tasks.keys()))} registered') "

success_criteria.criterion: Integration with Phase 1 and Phase 2 verified

expected_output.output_example:
============================================================ PHASE 3 VERIFICATION ============================================================ Timestamp: 2026-01-28T15:30:00
Checking: File Existence... ✅ PASS: All 11 required files exist
Checking: Python Imports... ✅ PASS: All 6 import groups successful
Checking: Celery Configuration... ✅ PASS: Celery configuration valid
Checking: Redis Connection... ✅ PASS: Redis connection OK (127.0.0.1:6379/0)
Checking: Neo4j Connection... ✅ PASS: Neo4j connection OK (bolt://127.0.0.1:7687)
Checking: Celery Tasks Registered... ✅ PASS: 1 Celery tasks registered
Checking: Phase 2 Integration... ✅ PASS: Phase 2 integration verified (EntityAwareChunker, LLMEntityExtractor)
Checking: Documentation Files... ✅ PASS: 3/3 documentation files present
Checking: Test Scripts... ✅ PASS: All 3 test scripts importable
Checking: Environment Variables... ✅ PASS: Environment variables configured (8 checks passed)
============================================================ VERIFICATION SUMMARY ============================================================ Checks passed: 10 Checks failed: 0 Warnings: 0
Pass rate: 100.0%
============================================================ ✅ PHASE 3 VERIFICATION PASSED ============================================================
Phase 3 is complete and production-ready!
Next steps: 1. Review Phase 3 deliverables 2. Run E2E test with real document: python api/test_celery_tasks_e2e.py 3. Proceed to next phase or production deployment

deliverables.deliverable: New api/verify_phase_3.py - Comprehensive Phase 3 verification script
Verification report - Output from running verify_phase_3.py

phase_3_deliverables.deliverable: post_verification.py (Comprehensive system check) - Implemented as verify_phase_3.py
Neo4j contains Document, Entity, and Relationship nodes

success_criteria.criterion: All configuration is centralized (no hardcoded strings)
Celery worker processes a sample document without errors

next_steps.substep: Production Readiness Assessment - Evaluate system for production deployment
Performance Optimization - Tune parameters based on real-world usage
Monitoring & Alerting - Set up production monitoring
next_steps.step: Or proceed to additional feature development phases

notes.note: Phase 3 verification is automated - no manual checks required beyond running the script
All checks must pass for Phase 3 to be considered complete
Use --verbose flag for detailed debugging information
Summary document should be filled out after successful verification

status.checkpoint: Final human review after all checks pass
